title: Harden ask-chatgpt for agent use: real UC2 closeout + real model-selection + short-response completion + consumer usage guide (REAL SITE over CDP)

T1_real_uc2_roundtrip.evidence: orchestration/reports/M-009/T1-uc2-roundtrip.json: shipped config (download_selector_injected=null), retrieve_outcome=retrieved, bundle_source=download, 161B, content_correct=true (favorite_color red->blue, sibling favorite_food unchanged). Closes M-008b follow-up #1.
production_fixes: keystone never-saw-streaming completion (driver.py) — fixes the retrieve double-wait truncation; commit eb26c9a
opaque-real download mode (patch.py) + real.json download_artifact populated; commit e386bc4
T1_real_uc2_roundtrip.trust: verified-independently (manager re-derived from artifacts + real probe; opaque test + suite green)

T2_short_response_completion.evidence: T2-short-response.json: 4/4 returned (PING/hi/7/OK), spurious_truncations=[]; +2 new unit tests; guard tests (_MicroPauseCompletionState,_PrematureGlobalMarkerState) stay green. Addresses M-008b follow-up #3.
T2_short_response_completion.trust: verified-independently (manager re-ran full suite 212/4; RED proven first)

T3_real_model_selection.evidence: T3-model-findings.md: current ChatGPT UI exposes no targetable model switcher (full 37-testid inventory; only non-clickable ChatGPT + reasoning-effort control). model_menu/model_option stay EMPTY (no real.json change). VERIFIED: explicit model request over real CDP raises SelectorUnavailableError BEFORE send (never silently wrong-model). Default no-model path works. Commit 7ac9304.

T4_usage_guide.status: written + independently overclaim-checked (PASS after one fix)
T4_usage_guide.evidence: docs/USAGE.md; independent pi verifier T5-usage-overclaim-verify.md (8 dimensions, 7 OK + 1 concern FIXED: error-table exit-code wording). No residual overclaim.

suite: uv run pytest -q => 212 passed, 4 deselected (manager + independent pi re-run); baseline 209 +2 never-saw-streaming +1 opaque-UC2; fail-closed test updated in place
conformance: no stealth; CDP attach-only + detach-not-quit; login never automated; tier purity (real_site + ASK_CHATGPT_REAL=1 double-gate, 0 real_site in default run); no leakage (account identifier scrubbed mid-run, leaked report deleted, probe hardened; final grep clean); human-paced, audited, no message cap; never pushed
recommended_next_missions: Real model selection (T3 follow-up): revisit when the model switcher is reachable; capture trigger + per-model option selectors over CDP; select_model must OPEN the render-on-open dropdown BEFORE enumerating model_option (today it enumerates before menu.click, which fits the mock <select> not a real Radix menu).
Deep Research / general ChatGPT add-ons (deferred per contract).
Optional: harden code-interpreter-turn completion (M-008b follow-up #4); durable cross-process registry stdout artifact (M-008b follow-up #2).

telemetry.note: pi worker ESTIMATE/ACTUAL lines are in their per-task reports (T2-keystone, T1-opaque, T5-verify); real timestamps used throughout (date -Iseconds / audit ISO).

paradigm_signals: Three production paths were mock-shaped vs the real DOM: (1) wait_for_completion double-wait needed streaming_seen relaxation; (2) download scan required integrity metadata the real bare button lacks; (3) select_model enumerates options before opening the menu. Pattern: mock fixtures encode a self-describing/always-in-DOM shape the real ChatGPT surface does not provide — treat each mock-proven real path as unproven until a real CDP probe exercises the PRODUCTION code, not a bespoke probe.
